//: Example Codex hooks for agent-lessonbook (also expressible as [hooks] tables in ~/.codex/config.toml — see config.toml.example). Fix the path to lessonbook_hook.py. TRIGGER-ONLY, same discipline as the Claude version. NOTE: Codex PostToolUse exposes tool_response but not a numeric exit code, so the failure->drift nudge is best-effort on Codex (it matches error/traceback text). UserPromptSubmit + PreCompact behave the same as on Claude.
